reasoning: The forecasted threshold is $57.97 (the market close price on Friday, Jan 30, 2026). MDLZ has seen a significant run-up in late January, rising from $53-$54 to almost $58, likely in anticipation of its Feb 3 earnings report and due to a recent easing in cocoa prices. While analysts see long-term upside—citing an average price target of around $69—short-term technical and seasonal factors suggest caution. The stock is currently at a localized peak over the past roughly three months. A proprietary linear trend model places the probability of exceeding $57.97 at 0.46, and historical seasonal performance is even weaker (0.33), suggesting the recent rally may be a 'buy the rumor' event susceptible to a pullback on earnings (since 2026 EPS is still pressured by previously locked higher-priced cocoa). Therefore, the likelihood of remaining above the elevated $57.97 threshold immediately following earnings (Feb 8) is estimated slightly below 50% (0.45). For the longer one-month horizon (Mar 3), probability reverts closer to the 50% base rate (0.48), reflecting typical upward market drift and high uncertainty over subsequent weeks.
